app.name: Instantly
app.bestFor: High-volume senders and agencies running unlimited inboxes on a tight budget, with strong deliverability tooling.

app.name: Smartlead
app.bestFor: Agency-scale cold email with white-label client portals and unlimited inboxes on every plan.

app.name: Lemlist
app.bestFor: Visual personalization — personalized images, GIFs, and video built into the sequence builder.

app.name: Apollo.io
app.bestFor: Combining prospecting and outreach in one tool with a 275M+ contact database.

app.name: Saleshandy
app.bestFor: High-volume senders scaling AI outreach cheaply, bundling an 852M+ B2B lead database.

app.name: Snov.io
app.bestFor: Startups on a tight budget wanting email finder, verifier, drip campaigns, and a CRM in one low-cost plan.

app.name: Clay
app.bestFor: AI-driven prospect research and data enrichment to power deep personalization at scale.

skill.name: marketingskills / cold-email (Corey Haines)
skill.bestFor: The de-facto leader for the cold-outreach craft: a SKILL.md that writes B2B cold emails and multi-touch follow-up sequences (subject lines, openers, CTAs, cadence). Lives in the most-adopted marketing Agent Skills repo (~41.5k stars). Writes copy — does not send.

skill.name: Mautic
skill.bestFor: The recognized open-source marketing-automation platform (~10.2k stars); its campaign/drip builder drives multi-step email sequences. Built for nurture more than pure cold prospecting, so it is adapted for outreach rather than cold-native.

skill.name: listmonk
skill.bestFor: The highest-star self-hosted bulk email / campaign sender (~22.4k stars). Newsletter and opt-in oriented rather than cold-native, so it is a strong sending backend but not a sequencing or copywriting tool — hence medium for cold outreach.

skill.name: BillionMail
skill.bestFor: A self-hosted mail server plus marketing/newsletter stack (~15.4k stars) for sending on your own domain and IP at scale. Sending infrastructure and deliverability, not cold sequencing or copy.

skill.name: OpenOutreach
skill.bestFor: A purpose-built self-hosted AI cold-outreach agent (~2.5k stars) that finds ICP leads, resolves work emails and sends personalized outreach from your own mailbox. The closest OSS fit for an end-to-end cold pipeline, but younger and smaller than the platforms above.

skill.name: coldoutboundskills
skill.bestFor: A 29-skill cold-outbound SKILL.md bundle (~559 stars) built from 1,000+ real B2B campaigns, covering strategy, deliverability setup, lead-gen, copywriting and campaign optimization — the deepest dedicated cold-outbound skill set after Corey Haines'.

skill.name: LeadMagic GTM Skills
skill.bestFor: The largest open catalog of GTM / cold-outbound SKILL.md playbooks (200+ playbooks covering outbound, enrichment, ICP scoring, ABM), but minimal GitHub adoption so far (~26 stars) — broad on paper, unproven, hence low confidence.

notes: Skill/Repo track rebuilt and re-ranked by real quality/reputation/adoption (verified GitHub stars, de-facto status) rather than by form factor — 'kind' is a tag only. It now mixes genuine SKILL.md Agent Skills and notable open-source repos. Corey Haines' marketingskills cold-email skill leads (~41.5k stars) as the recognized cold-outreach craft resource. Honest caveat: the highest-star repos here (listmonk, BillionMail) are newsletter/sending infrastructure, and Mautic is nurture-oriented automation, so none is truly cold-native — they are marked medium for this use case and pair with an app-track cold-email platform for sending. OpenOutreach is the closest purpose-built OSS cold-outreach tool. No MCP servers; the prior MCP entries were removed as out of scope.
